creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch is broken:
diff --git "a/www/waterfox/files/\n" "b/www/waterfox/files/\n"
new file mode 100644
index 000000000000..954b78f5bf37
--- /dev/null
+++ "b/www/waterfox/files/\n"
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+Enable FLAC on platforms without ffvpx like powerpc*
+
+--- dom/media/flac/FlacDecoder.cpp.orig        2021-04-15 19:44:28 UTC
++++ dom/media/flac/FlacDecoder.cpp
< ... cut ... >

$ git apply 0001-waterfox-new-port.patch
0001-waterfox-new-port.patch:229: trailing whitespace.

0001-waterfox-new-port.patch:231: trailing whitespace.

0001-waterfox-new-port.patch:275: trailing whitespace.

0001-waterfox-new-port.patch:313: trailing whitespace.

0001-waterfox-new-port.patch:319: trailing whitespace.

warning: squelched 6537 whitespace errors
warning: 6542 lines add whitespace errors.
